note: EN vehicle descriptions (Stufe 2, translated from descriptionDe). Sync-safe: not overwritten by sync-vehicles.mjs.

descriptions.orig-100i: Tour the universe with the perfect blend of luxury and performance. The 100i features Origin Jumpworks' patented AIR fuel system, making it the most efficient and eco-friendly ship on the market. The 100i is capable of long-haul flights that most ships its size simply aren't equipped for, making it perfect for solo pilots who want to turn heads without sacrificing functionality or reliability.
descriptions.orig-125a: Risks are meant to be taken, but why risk running out of fuel in the heat of battle? With the AIR fuel system, a sophisticated weapons loadout, and all the luxury and refinement you'd expect from Origin Jumpworks, the 125a is built for the discerning lone wolf.
descriptions.orig-135c: With a deceptive amount of storage space packed into its sleek, stylish frame and Origin's patented AIR fuel system, the 135c is the top choice for musicians, couriers, and anyone looking to get the party started. Get it there fast and look good doing it.
descriptions.orig-300i: If you're going to travel the stars... why not do it in style? The 300i is Origin Jumpworks' first luxury spacecraft. It's a sleek, silver killer that sends as much of a message with its silhouette as it does with its guns.
descriptions.orig-315p: Exploration is humanity's highest calling. Prepare to reach distant horizons with humanity's most sophisticated technology, the ORIGIN 315p. It comes with a more robust power plant and a custom scanning package developed exclusively by Chimera Communications.
descriptions.orig-325a: Just because it's a rough galaxy doesn't mean you have to sacrifice your comfort: the 325a can come out on top in any dogfight. The 325a boasts an advanced weapons payload as well as a targeting system developed by WillsOp specifically for the 325a.
descriptions.orig-350r: Origin Jumpworks' 300 series is the ultimate fusion of elegance and power. Every component, every part is individually calibrated, so no matter which model and options you choose, your ship stays in perfect harmony as the ultimate in astro-engineering. The 350r, by far the fastest member of the family, refocuses all the power of the 300 series and translates it into pure speed.
descriptions.orig-400i: Exploring the stars is a noble undertaking, and Origin Jumpworks has risen to the challenge with the 400i, the ultimate high-performance pathfinder. The 400i is a harmonious interplay of style, quality, and refinement. It offers the greatest range in its class, extensive defensive capabilities, and a factory-installed scanning system, all without losing the comfort and elegance Origin is known for. Take on the harshest corners of the galaxy without compromise.
descriptions.orig-600i: Let's begin the journey with Origin Jumpworks' 2947 600i. This multi-role luxury ship from Origin Jumpworks is distinguished by an exquisite, detailed hull design that combines performance and versatility in an elegant, timeless form. The 600i is equipped with cutting-edge modular technology that lets you tailor your ship to your needs. Want to write your name into history by discovering a new star system? The 600i's Explorer module swaps the lounge for a rugged scanner station along with additional supply points, further boosting the ship's effectiveness.
descriptions.orig-600i-bis2951: Let's begin the journey with Origin Jumpworks' 2947 600i. This multi-role luxury ship from Origin Jumpworks is distinguished by an exquisite, detailed hull design that combines performance and versatility in an elegant, timeless form. The 600i is equipped with cutting-edge modular technology that lets you tailor your ship to your needs. Want to write your name into history by discovering a new star system? The 600i's Explorer module swaps the lounge for a rugged scanner station along with additional supply points, further boosting the ship's effectiveness.
descriptions.orig-600i-touring: Let's begin the journey with Origin Jumpworks' 2947 600i. This multi-role luxury ship from Origin Jumpworks is distinguished by an exquisite, detailed hull design that combines performance and versatility in an elegant, timeless form. The 600i is equipped with cutting-edge modular technology that lets you tailor your ship to your needs. Taking the family on a long-distance journey through the stars? The Touring module lets your guests relax amid stunning furnishings from some of the finest designers in the Empire.
descriptions.orig-85x: Elegantly styled and carefully engineered, the 85X is a versatile, all-around exploration ship that delivers precise control both in and out of the atmosphere. Using the same thruster technology as the 300 series, it has the power of a racer paired with the reliability of a touring ship. Whether you're descending to a planet's surface or exploring the sights of your system, this runabout continues Origin's proud tradition of turning heads.
descriptions.orig-890jump: With a sleek, understated exterior that belies its spacious interior, the 890 Jump is a true marvel of engineering; it was designed to impress from every angle, combining a unique, innovative design with the finest materials and the most advanced technology. The result is a ship in a class of its own, a masterpiece worthy of the ORIGIN name.
descriptions.crus-spirit-a1: Crusader Industries brings its trademark commitment to excellence straight to the civilian market with the A1 Spirit. This medium-sized multi-purpose spacecraft is outfitted as a light bomber, yet offers enough versatility to handle a variety of tasks and unpredictable jobs.
descriptions.crus-starlifter-a2: The A2 gunship has been deployed to devastating effect in airstrikes, search-and-rescue operations, and ground initiatives. With more than double the firepower of the M2 and a custom-built bomb bay capable of delivering a staggering payload, the A2 is ideal for anyone hauling large quantities of cargo through potentially hostile territory.
descriptions.rsi-apollo-medivac: The 2948 Apollo Medivac, alongside superior armor and dual missile racks, is a tribute to the classic 2910 film Astromedics: Back from the Brink, featuring a paint scheme that exactly replicates the headliner Kithara.
descriptions.rsi-apollo-triage: Roberts Space Industries' legendary Apollo chassis is the gold standard in medical evacuation and rapid emergency response, providing critical aid to the known universe for well over two centuries.
descriptions.crus-starfighter-inferno: Whether leading a crew or hunting down capital ships solo, the Ares Inferno is a force to be reckoned with. This ballistic Gatling-equipped variant shreds the armor of warships and reduces smaller fighters to dust in seconds.
descriptions.crus-starfighter-ion: With the Ares Ion, you strike fear into the corridors of the mightiest gunboats and frigates. This laser-equipped variant delivers extremely powerful shots that can quickly knock out even the shields of the largest enemy ships.
descriptions.anvl-arrow: Meet Anvil's "light fighter of the future." With an ultra-aerodynamic frame, a lightweight profile, and the most advanced maneuvering thruster technology, it's the most agile ship in its class. Thanks to a generous standard weapons loadout that includes four missile mounts and a full array of countermeasures, it can hold its own even in a knock-down, drag-out fight. The Arrow was purpose-built to leave would-be interlopers completely bewildered. After all, how can they kill what they can't catch?
descriptions.anvl-asgard: A heavily armored vehicle dropship equipped for boundless resilience in the hottest combat zones. Power through relentless fire to deliver vital reinforcements, hold the front line, and keep the enemy retreating.
descriptions.argo-atls: Single-handedly load and unload the biggest haulers with the power of Argo. The ATLS power suit's unique exo-frame helps you work quickly, easily, and safely - whatever the task.
descriptions.argo-atls-geo-collector-grad03: Single-handedly load and unload the biggest haulers with the power of Argo. The ATLS power suit's unique exo-frame helps you work quickly, easily, and safely - whatever the task.
descriptions.argo-atls-geo: Built on the proven ATLS power suit chassis, the GEO is outfitted with bespoke mining components and a Jump Pack to open up the most inaccessible (and prosperous) corners of the galaxy.
descriptions.argo-atls-geo-collector-grad01: Single-handedly load and unload the biggest haulers with the power of Argo. The ATLS power suit's unique exo-frame helps you work quickly, easily, and safely - whatever the task.
descriptions.rsi-aurora-gs-cl: Purpose-built for trading and commercial expeditions, the Aurora Clipper is the perfect ship for aspiring entrepreneurs and seasoned traders alike. Thanks to its expanded cargo capacity, the Clipper raises the bar for what a personal trading ship can be.
descriptions.rsi-aurora-gs-es: The Aurora is the modern descendant of the Roberts Space Industries X-7, the spacecraft that tested the very first jump drives. The Aurora Essential is the perfect choice for new ship owners: versatile enough to take on a wide range of challenges, yet with a simple, intuitive design.
descriptions.rsi-aurora-gs-ln: With a more robust shield generator and a pair of additional weapon hardpoints, the Legionnaire is a dedicated fighter, engineered to handle any obstacle the universe can throw at you.
descriptions.rsi-aurora-gs-lx: Take pride in your roots with the brand-new Aurora Deluxe, built for the discerning pilot who never forgets where they came from. The LX features a lacquered-leather interior that guarantees comfort on long hauls through the deep black.
descriptions.rsi-aurora-gs-mr: Perhaps you're looking for something with carrying capacity that can also hold its own in a fight? The Aurora Marque comes equipped with a pair of Behring-grade lasers and a high-quality weapon cooling system.
descriptions.rsi-aurora-gs-se: The culmination of the Aurora Mk I's long legacy. With the versatility of the MR, the cargo capacity of the CL, the firepower of the LN, and the luxury of the LX, the Special Edition is the ultimate farewell to this beloved starter ship staple.
descriptions.rsi-aurora-mk2: The continuation of a legacy, the Aurora is reimagined for the future. A signature starter ship for those making their first voyage into the stars, the Aurora Mk II prioritizes versatility with modular components for customizable performance.
descriptions.aegs-avenger-stalker: Originally conceived as a frontline carrier for the military, the Avenger Stalker took a different path and ultimately enjoyed a long and storied career as the standard patrol ship of the UEE Advocacy. The Avenger uses its cargo hold for prisoner transport and features a rugged, reliable hull with the capacity for larger-than-expected engine mounts. This is the standard Avenger chassis with the pre-installed Stalker Prisoner Transport module.
descriptions.aegs-avenger-titan: Thanks to the extra space in the rear, the Titan's cargo hold is free for freight. Combined with the Avenger's proven combat capabilities, you get a light cargo hauler that can more than hold its own in a fight.
descriptions.aegs-avenger-titan-renegade: Created as part of the "Masters of Flight" series in collaboration with the Arena Commander flight simulator, the Renegade honors renowned pilot Danny Solomon for his remarkable work with the Advocacy in bringing justice to Bremen. This Avenger Titan comes equipped with special dogfight-focused gear and a distinctive paint job that pays tribute to this legendary ship.
descriptions.aegs-avenger-warlock:
Equipped with a Behring REP-8 EMP generator, the Warlock enables non-lethal suppression through a powerful electromagnetic wave capable of disabling any electronics within the blast radius.

This is the standard Avenger chassis with the pre-installed Warlock EMP module.
descriptions.vncl-blade: Vanduul light fighters, known as the "Blade," are often deployed as scouts and first-wave attackers. Over decades of conflict, they have increasingly been used to knock out comm arrays and early-warning systems. They have also served well as engagement units, since their speed lets them run down ships attempting to flee. Once engaged, expect the Blade to use its speed and agility to wear down your defenses.
descriptions.drak-buccaneer: The Buccaneer was designed from the ground up to fly and fight the way you live. There's no leather upholstery or hyper-cushioning here: the Bucc is a brawler built to out-maneuver and outfight ships above its weight class. This rough-and-tumble frontline fighter can operate in the harshest conditions to keep real working crews alive on the job.
descriptions.crus-spirit-c1: With the C1 Spirit, Crusader Industries brings its trademark commitment to peak performance straight to the civilian market. This medium multipurpose spacecraft was built to transport and deliver goods, yet is versatile enough to handle a range of duties and unpredictable tasks.
descriptions.crus-starlifter-c2: With the Hercules' patented military spaceframe and expanded cargo capacity while minimizing firepower, the C2 has taken the private sector by storm. It has become the industry standard for racing teams, ship dealers and manufacturers, construction firms, mining companies, and even large tourist entertainment venues.
descriptions.anvl-c8-pisces: Designed specifically for the Anvil Carrack, this snub craft is the perfect reconnaissance, landing, and support ship for the iconic explorer. Despite its size, it can also operate on its own thanks to a quantum drive, class-leading shields, and the ability to fit a jump module.
descriptions.anvl-c8r-pisces: With an additional Tier 3 medical bed on board, the C8R Pisces can treat minor injuries and keep a patient stable while transporting them to the safety of a larger ship, a station, or a nearby medical facility, making it an invaluable tool for short-range search and rescue operations.
descriptions.anvl-c8x-pisces-expedition: Additional firepower makes the Pisces an exceptionally capable mini-explorer. Ideal for traveling between systems or exploring tight spots inaccessible to larger ships, it's a small craft ready for big adventures.
descriptions.anvl-carrack: The Anvil Carrack features reinforced fuel tanks for long-range flight, an advanced jump drive, and a dedicated computer core for jump charting. Originally a military exclusive, the Carrack is now available for civilian use. Onboard accommodations include crew medical and repair facilities as well as a cartography-focused sensor suite.
descriptions.anvl-carrack-expedition: The Anvil Carrack features reinforced fuel tanks for long-range flight, an advanced jump drive, and a dedicated computer core for jump charting. Originally a military exclusive, the Carrack is now available for civilian use. Onboard accommodations include crew medical and repair facilities as well as a cartography-focused sensor suite.
descriptions.drak-caterpillar: First introduced in 2871, Drake Interplanetary's Caterpillar has long proven itself a reliable, cost-effective multi-role ship that can be outfitted for everything from mercantile work to combat support. Long celebrated as a hard-fought alternative to the ubiquitous Hull series, the Caterpillar is a hauler that doesn't skimp on weapons or custom solutions.
descriptions.drak-caterpillar-pirate: Drake claims that the Caterpillar, a sprawling, modular ship that at least roughly resembles its namesake, is intended for legitimate trade and extended search and rescue operations... but this particular paint scheme seems to suggest otherwise.
descriptions.anvl-centurion: Based on Anvil's popular Atlas platform, the Centurion is a tactical solution for short-range anti-air operations. Dominate any combat zone by ensuring immediate aerial threats are neutralized quickly and efficiently, thanks to the Centurion's purpose-built energy-based flak turret.
descriptions.drak-clipper: A solo-flyable ship with multipurpose capabilities, built for freethinkers and lone travelers. Drake's signature industrial design and evocative asymmetrical aesthetic make the Clipper a visual spectacle as well as a practical standout.
descriptions.rsi-constellation-andromeda: The Constellation Andromeda, a multi-crew freighter, is the most popular ship in RSI's current production lineup. Constellations are beloved by smugglers and traders alike because they're modular, powerful... and just plain iconic-looking.
descriptions.rsi-constellation-aquila: Explore every distant horizon! The Constellation Aquila features a redesigned cockpit for maximum visibility, advanced sensors, and an integrated Ursa Rover for planetary exploration. Let's see what's out there!
descriptions.rsi-constellation-phoenix:
A special luxury spacecraft for the discerning star captain. The Constellation Phoenix can serve as an organizational flagship and features a lavish, redesigned interior.

The Phoenix comes with a Lynx Rover and a Kruger P-72 Archimedes fighter.
descriptions.rsi-constellation-phoenix-emerald: Whether you're a discerning socialite or a free-roaming party animal, the Constellation Phoenix Emerald is your personal pass to entertainment. With a chicly designed interior cabin built specifically for the festivities and a lucky limited-edition paint job, the Emerald is the perfect place to sip a glass of Radegast Gold or throw back a green Sleeping Tiger malt while it luxuriously races through the stars. Just be sure to bring along a designated pilot. The Phoenix Emerald comes with a Lynx Rover and a Kruger P-72 Archimedes fighter.
descriptions.rsi-constellation-taurus: Experience the adventure of a multi-crew Constellation at a bargain price! The Constellation Taurus is a pure freighter. The Taurus is fully configurable but without all the bells and whistles, making it perfect for getting started in the world of multi-crew ships.
descriptions.drak-corsair: Answer the call of uncharted space and embrace the spirit of exploration with the Drake Corsair, a worthy companion that supports you in combat, discovery, and delivery wherever the winds of adventure may carry you.
descriptions.argo-csv-cargo: The CSV-SM is the logistical lifeblood of any hangar or outpost operation. Move essential materials freely and easily.
descriptions.drak-cutlass-black: Drake Interplanetary claims the Cutlass Black is an affordable, easy-to-maintain solution for local in-system militias. Its larger-than-average cargo hold, RIO seat, and dedicated tractor mount are, as the company literature emphasizes, designed to facilitate search and rescue operations.
descriptions.drak-cutlass-blue: Sleek, mean, and regal. The Cutlass Blue builds on the standard model with missiles, a more aggressive engine, and durasteel holding cells in the cargo bay. The Cutlass Blue is the standard patrol ship of the Outer Worlds militia.
descriptions.drak-cutlass-red: The Cutlass Red converts the standard cargo hold into a fully equipped medical facility complete with an autodoc. This ambulance comes fitted with the Nav-E7 Echo transponder, a long-range scanner, and a Secure Plus docking collar, making it ideal for search and rescue. This model also features a unique red-cross skin.
descriptions.drak-cutlass-steel: Drake knows things get rough out there. Beyond the so-called protection of the UEE, it's the law of the jungle: whoever has the guns and the personnel makes the rules. With the Cutlass Steel, Drake has your back on both fronts.
descriptions.drak-cutter: Built for hard-working people of every stripe, the Cutter offers 4 SCU of cargo space and plenty of power in a compact, rugged frame. It's a ship that embodies the spirit of Drake: no matter who you are or what you do, you can reach the stars.
descriptions.drak-cutter-rambler: The pilot-favorite Cutter chassis, kitted out for long hauls and extended expeditions. Go ahead, take the scenic route.
descriptions.drak-cutter-scout: The Scout builds on the do-it-all attitude of the original Cutter, expanding its combat and utility capabilities with upgraded weapons and scanning components. Support a small fleet or go it alone: the Cutter Scout is a versatile starter ship that makes no compromises when it counts.
descriptions.tmbl-cyclone: With a strong combination of speed, maneuverability, and rugged durability, the Cyclone is the perfect choice for local deliveries and transport between homesteads on planets and outposts.
descriptions.tmbl-cyclone-aa: The Cyclone AA is a battlefield equalizer, featuring a surface-to-air missile and a countermeasures package to cover ground troops against airborne targets.
descriptions.tmbl-cyclone-rc: For those looking to push the limits of speed, the Cyclone RC features a modified intake system that enables controlled bursts of speed, along with tools for tuning its handling.
descriptions.tmbl-cyclone-rn: Stay mobile and vigilant with the Cyclone RN. This light reconnaissance vehicle is the perfect solution for scouting runs, enabling fast, detailed terrain scans as well as the placement of beacons.
descriptions.tmbl-cyclone-tr: Designed for use by militia and security forces, the Cyclone TR module features improved armor and a single manned turret capable of mounting a Size 1 weapon with a responsive 360-degree field of fire.
descriptions.banu-defender: Meet the Banu Defender, a multi-crew fighter whose patchwork design showcases technology drawn from a wide variety of species. Though its cargo hold is limited, the Defender offers its crew modest accommodations and easy access to its components. Defenders get their name from the role they play: the first line of defense against enemy attacks. That's why the Defender is the trader's ideal companion, one built for heavy transport and the other for deadly dogfighting. Every Banu trader knows that an investment in defense is an investment in their livelihood.
descriptions.drak-dragonfly: The Drake Dragonfly is the perfect ship for anyone who wants to live on the frontier. With the pilot exposed to the dangers of space, the Dragonfly is as much an adventure as it is a ship! Thanks to its dual-mode conversion, the Dragonfly can operate on the ground or in space, and a rear-facing second seat lets you even bring along a passenger! This black model is Drake's standard production version.
descriptions.drak-dragonfly-yellow: The Drake Dragonfly is the perfect ship for anyone who wants to live on the frontier. With the pilot exposed to the dangers of space, the Dragonfly is as much an adventure as it is a ship! Thanks to its dual-mode conversion, the Dragonfly can operate on the ground or in space, and a rear-facing second seat lets you even bring along a passenger! This exclusive Yellowjacket version is available only during the concept sale.
descriptions.aegs-eclipse: The Aegis Eclipse is a bomber designed to slip in and strike before it's ever detected. After extensive service with the UEE, this high-tech specialist makes its civilian-market debut in 2947.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7a-mk1: A space combat legend of centuries past.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7a-mk2: The F7A, the UEE Navy's premier carrier-based fighter, is the frontline combat ship for military engagements. Though it isn't equipped for long-range runs, the Hornet can take its share of hits... and deliver a consistent, powerful response.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7c: To the enemy, it's a weapon not to be underestimated. To allies, it's a savior. The F7C Hornet is the same reliable and resilient multi-role fighter that has become the face of the UEE Navy. The F7C is the foundation you can build on to meet all of your needs.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7c-mk2: Harness the power, speed, and offensive punch of the UEE Navy's finest carrier-based fighter, made famous by its dominant role in the Vanduul War.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7c-wildfire: Developed as part of the "Masters of Flight" series in collaboration with the Arena Commander flight simulator, the Wildfire honors renowned pilot Aria Reilly for her outstanding service with the legendary Squadron 42. This Hornet comes fitted with her own personally chosen loadout preferences and a custom special paint scheme that pays tribute to her iconic ship.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cm-heartseeker: Designed for pilots whose true love is the pulse-pounding thrill of a bone-rattling dogfight, Anvil's limited-edition Heartseeker presents itself as "the one" for genuine fighters. Packed with premium, near-military components and four imposing Behring laser cannons, this wild annihilator refines the legendary combat prowess of the Super Hornet and gives you the decisive edge in space combat.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cm-mk2-heartseeker: Designed for pilots whose true love is the pulse-pounding thrill of a bone-rattling dogfight, Anvil's limited-edition Heartseeker presents itself as "the one" for genuine fighters. Packed with premium, near-military components and four imposing Behring laser cannons, this wild annihilator refines the legendary combat prowess of the Super Hornet and gives you the decisive edge in space combat.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cm: The F7C-M Super Hornet, as close to the military spec as legally possible for a civilian model, brings back the turret and packs near-military-grade parts under the hood. Proving that two heads are better than one, a second seat has been added to share the logistics and combat duties, making the Super Hornet a truly fearsome target.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cm-mk2: The Super Hornet is back and upgraded to Mk II spec, making it deadlier than ever. The only Hornet model with two seats, it features a dedicated gunner's turret for increased firepower, accuracy, and all-round combat proficiency.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cr: If the Ghost is meant to hide, then the Tracker is meant to seek. The F7C-R Tracker features an advanced radar array that makes it ideal for deep-space explorers who need depth and precision in their scanning setups. Local militias and larger mercenary outfits also repurpose the Tracker to serve as mobile command-and-control ships for their squadrons.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cr-mk2: Formidable fighter with enhanced scanning capabilities.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cs: Through a combination of low-emission thrusters, low-energy weapons, and Void Armor technology capable of scattering scans, the F7C-S Ghost is designed for the pilot who wants to keep a low profile. The Ghost is able to slip past even the most persistent observers to reach the objective you need to reach. Don't worry, we won't ask.
descriptions.anvl-hornet-f7cs-mk2: Low-signature fighter built for scouting and ambushing unaware foes.
descriptions.anvl-lightning-f8: Few vehicles command the same reverence as the legendary F8 Lightning. It has protected humanity countless times against countless threats, both at home and far beyond the reaches of civilization - a force to be reckoned with.
descriptions.anvl-lightning-f8c: Few vehicles command the same reverence as the legendary F8 Lightning. It has protected humanity countless times against countless threats, both at home and far beyond the reaches of civilization - a force to be reckoned with.
descriptions.anvl-lightning-f8c-exec: Few vehicles command the same reverence as the legendary F8 Lightning. It has protected humanity countless times against countless threats, both at home and far beyond the reaches of civilization - a force to be reckoned with.
descriptions.misc-fury: With Mirai's next-generation snub fighter, you'll push performance to its limits. It's armed with four halo-mounted Size 2 laser repeaters, best-in-class maneuverability, and an unprecedented integration of Xi'an technology. Together, these make the Fury a revelation in close-quarters space combat.
descriptions.misc-fury-lx: The next-generation racer, Mirai's Fury LX, stands out with best-in-class maneuverability and fully integrated, cutting-edge Xi'an technology. The sleek ship's offensive capabilities are swapped out for additional maneuvering thrusters, perfect for crossing the finish line.
descriptions.misc-fury-miru: With Mirai's next-generation dive bomber, you'll push performance to its limits. It carries twenty halo-mounted missiles, best-in-class maneuverability, and an unprecedented integration of Xi'an technology. Together, these make the Fury MX ready to obliterate targets and redefine close-quarters space combat.
descriptions.anvl-gladiator: The civilian model of the Gladiator appeals to those who want to explore the 'verse with a little more security. Carrying a maximum of two people, the Gladiator is perfectly equipped to explore and fight with or without a wingman. The civilian model lets pilots choose between an additional cargo hold and a bomb bay.
descriptions.aegs-gladius: The Gladius is an older design that has been updated over the years to keep pace with modern technology. In military circles, the Gladius is highly regarded for its performance and simplicity. A fast, lightweight fighter with a focus on dogfighting, the Gladius makes an ideal interceptor or escort ship.
descriptions.aegs-gladius-valiant: Developed as part of the 'Masters of Flight' series in collaboration with the Arena Commander flight simulator, the Valiant honors the famed defense pilot Condi Hillard, the first human in history to defeat a Vanduul in combat. This Gladius comes equipped with specialized, dogfighting-focused gear and a custom special edition that pays tribute to her legendary ship.
descriptions.vncl-glaive: The Glaive is a symmetrical version of the Scythe. Generally flown by Vanduul with more combat experience, they are better armed and feature two massive blade-wings, unlike the standard Scythe. This model is a human reproduction manufactured by Esperia.
descriptions.drak-golem: The Drake Golem is an accessible tool built to end the corporate monopoly on mining and place your future firmly within your grasp. Focused and highly capable yet accessible to all, it's the ideal entry into deep-space mining.
descriptions.drak-golem-ox: A Drake workhorse for the hauling world. With a generous cargo capacity, external storage, and easy off-loading, the OX puts function and performance above all else for solo pilots.
descriptions.mrai-guardian: Single-operator, long-range heavy fighter with a focus on raw firepower and precision.
descriptions.mrai-guardian-mx: Mirai's already deadly Guardian, tuned for uncompromised combat performance with harder-hitting weapons and heavier defense.
descriptions.mrai-guardian-qi: Single-operator fighter-interceptor with a focus on raw firepower and precision.
descriptions.aegs-hammerhead: The Hammerhead is a fast, multi-turret patrol ship built to counter fighters, equally suited to supporting larger capital ships in a fleet or serving as a flagship for combat groups.
descriptions.aegs-hammerhead-showdown: A fast, multi-turret patrol ship built to counter fighters, the Hammerhead is equally suited to supporting larger capital ships in a fleet or serving as a flagship for combat groups.
descriptions.anvl-hawk: A small, lightweight fighter with a focus on weaponry, the Hawk boasts an impressive arsenal of lethal and non-lethal armaments, making it a perfect ship for independent bounty hunters or local security looking for a little more punch.
descriptions.drak-herald: The Drake Herald is a small, armored ship designed to transport information securely from point A to point B. With a powerful central engine unit (for high-speed travel and to generate the energy required for effective data encryption/limitation), advanced encryption software, and an armored computer core, the Herald is unique among personal spacecraft in that it's designed to be easily 'wiped' if in danger of capture.
descriptions.rsi-hermes: A freighter designed for maximum payloads and minimal crew. With generous internal storage, solo flyability, and solid defensive measures, RSI delivers opportunity, possibility, and assurance.
descriptions.cnou-hoverquad: Do you know the place where the roads end and the sky runs out? That little spot at the edge of adventure, where the only way is forward? Where you can dive headlong into glorious obscurity, soaring over every dune and around every patch of strange flora? That's the land of the HoverQuad, just waiting to be explored.
descriptions.anvl-hurricane: Big things come in small packages: the Hurricane is a combat ship that packs a deadly punch into a lightweight hull. The ship makes up for its lack of comfort with heavy firepower - six guns that can blast through just about anything. Hurricane pilots have yet to find an enemy shield they can't tear down.
descriptions.aegs-idris-m: Larger than a bomber but smaller than a ship of the line, frigates occupy an interesting place in the pantheon of warships. While they lack the heavy armor and main guns of a cruiser, frigates are more maneuverable and highly configurable.
descriptions.aegs-idris-p: The Idris-P is a dual 'Peacekeeper' variant developed for UEE patrol duty. It removes the standard ship's ship-to-ship cannon and spinal mount in favor of additional cargo capacity and greater speed.
descriptions.crus-intrepid: Versatile starter ship and light hauler built with true Crusader quality.
descriptions.drak-ironclad: The Ironclad gives deep-space hauling the respect it deserves, preparing you for the inherent risks. Heavy-duty durability and deadly weapons protect a vast payload of open-roof and ramp-accessible cargo.
descriptions.drak-ironclad-assault: With space for cargo, troops and small vehicles and ships, this Heavy Dropship brings more than just immense firepower and durability to the battlefield, it brings the ultimate combined arms platform.
descriptions.aegs-javelin: Developed for service with the UEE military, the Javelin is a massive, modular capital ship well suited to enterprise use. With a richly detailed interior, extensive modular room options, and a high crew capacity, the Javelin has made a name for itself across a wide range of roles.
descriptions.xian-scout: The Xi'an Aopoa Corporation produces an export model of the Qhire Khartu, the Khartu-al, for sale to human civilians. The export model features the same Xi'an maneuvering gear, but with control surfaces modified for human use and a more limited weapons loadout.
descriptions.krig-l21-wolf: A combat ship prioritizing quality and agility in a timeless design that embodies Kruger Intergalactic's core tenet: Perfection in Every Piece.
descriptions.krig-l22-alphawolf: This light fighter variant prioritizes quality and agility with retractable laser weapons and augmented missile capacity.
descriptions.rsi-lynx: With the RSI Lynx rover, you can explore the wildest corners of the world safely, comfortably, and in style. It's a jungle out there, but with the Lynx you'll have the comforts of home no matter where you are.
descriptions.crus-starlifter-m2: The M2 Hercules is the UEE's premier tactical starlifter. The ship's potent combination of capacity, maneuverability, and durability makes it the obvious choice for heavy transport, while a robust weapons package ensures that your cargo and crew arrive in one piece.
descriptions.orig-m50: If you want to get from point A to point B as fast as possible and with as much style as possible, then the ORIGIN M50 is exactly what you're after. With supercharged engines that offset a tiny weapons loadout, the M50 is a ship built for speed.
descriptions.orig-m80: Origin's first-ever heavy fighter continues a legacy of beauty and elegance combined with high performance. Retractable weapons, missiles, and high durability equip the M80 to dominate in sustained combat, a culmination of style and overwhelming force.
descriptions.rsi-mantis: Stop ships dead in their tracks with RSI's leading quantum enforcement ship. The Mantis comes equipped with a custom-built Wei-Tek Quantum Enforcement Device, whose Quantum Snare can tear ships out of quantum travel, while its Quantum Dampener prevents any hasty escapes.
descriptions.grin-mdc: The first ground vehicle in the 'verse to feature a PDT, the MDC joins the Greycat family. Its automated turret operates with ease to take out encroaching airborne threats and provide covering fire for your base of operations.
descriptions.crus-star-runner: The Mercury delivers everything expected of a reliable courier ship, and then some. When you need it there fast and intact, you can't do better than the Mercury. The Star Runner chassis was built on the same engineering and design principles that made Crusader the go-to manufacturer for galactic transport of every scale, setting a new standard for data and cargo haulage.
descriptions.rsi-meteor: A medium fighter from famed shipbuilder RSI, delivering a devastating mix of speed and firepower wrapped in the aggressive styling the brand is known for.
descriptions.misc-fortune: Get the job done quickly with MISC's most efficient salvager yet. It's not a simple job, but the Fortune makes it easier.
descriptions.misc-freelancer: Freelancers are used by major corporations as long-range trading ships, but they're just as often refitted into dedicated exploration vessels by independent captains looking to operate at the edge of the galaxy.
descriptions.misc-freelancer-dur: The Freelancer DUR variant is built for exploration. Trading away some of the standard Freelancer's cargo capacity for an improved quantum drive, a more advanced scanner, and an expanded fuel tank may seem like a poor bargain to some, but those who value discovery over profit will consider it their ship of choice.
descriptions.misc-freelancer-max: The Freelancer MAX variant is for those who prize cargo space above all else. Combine that extra storage with MISC's unrivaled reliability and reputation, and it's easy to see why the MAX is the go-to hauler for many independent shippers across the Empire today.
descriptions.misc-freelancer-mis: The Freelancer MIS is a limited-edition militarized variant of the classic UEE-developed trading ship. Only a very small number were produced, owing to a few earlier cargo incidents. This version sacrifices most of its cargo capacity to make room for missiles.
descriptions.misc-hull-a: The smallest and most affordable Hull. The Hull A is ideal for those simply traveling the galaxy on their own. It's most similar to the Aurora and Mustang, but without their jack-of-all-trades character. Where the others trade cargo capacity for firepower or speed, the Hull A is a 100% on-mission hauler. On top of that, Hull A (and B) ships are often used as station-to-orbit ferries.
descriptions.misc-hull-b: The Hull B is a sturdier option, most often pitched against MISC's own Freelancer. But where the Freelancers are equipped for long-range exploration and other tasks, the Hull B is a pure cargo hauler. Hull Bs are frequently used as corporate support ships, and it's not uncommon to see several in different liveries over the course of a single flight.
descriptions.misc-hull-c: Often called the best-known ship in the galaxy, the Hull C is the most-produced of the line and considered by many to be the most versatile. It's meant to hit the sweet spot between the smaller single-person haulers and the massive superfreighters that make up the rest of the range, offering the far-reaching modularity of the larger ships while retaining a minimum of maneuverability that anchors the lower end of the lineup.
descriptions.misc-prospector: For years, the Prospector has been the universe's mining ship of choice for solo operators. With MISC's sleek design sensibility and a suite of upgraded high-tech mining tools, the 2947 Prospector strikes a perfect balance between form and function. The Prospector can store 128 SCU of mined resources in its dedicated mining cargo pods; these cannot be used for normal cargo, which is why its cargo capacity is listed as 0 SCU.
descriptions.misc-reliant: With the Reliant Kore, MISC expands its already impressive ship range with a smaller, entry-level spacecraft. Drawing on advanced Xi'an designs, the Reliant features broad, slender wings, omnidirectional thrusters, and a fully articulating two-seat cockpit that supports both horizontal and vertical flight modes. All of this, combined with greater carrying capacity than many ships in its class, makes the Kore a natural choice for short-haul transport. Or, with the simple addition of a few optional components, this ship can do anything you dream up.
descriptions.misc-reliant-mako: The Empire runs on up-to-the-minute information, which is why reporters need to be able to get to where the news is happening: wherever, whenever, however. Enter the Mako, which combines all the flexibility and reliability of a MISC Reliant with a state-of-the-art image enhancement suite and turret-mounted optics to capture every moment as it unfolds, with the clarity and precision that makes headlines.
descriptions.misc-reliant-sen: Magellan, Pierce, Croshaw: names that echo through history thanks to an adventurous spirit, a curious nature, and a reliable ship. The Reliant Sen is a versatile mobile science platform equipped with long-range capabilities to take you farther, keep you out longer, and back it all with an advanced sensor suite. Perfect for the aspiring explorer who wants to whisper their name into the halls of history.
descriptions.misc-reliant-tana: As humanity continually expands across the universe, the need for a versatile light fighter has grown right along with it. Easy to maintain and built with a rugged construction, the Reliant Tana offers an ideal choice for frontier and outpost defense thanks to its custom high-performance power plant, stronger shields, and additional weapon mounts.
descriptions.misc-starfarer: The Starfarer sets itself apart from traditional bulk freighters in one crucial way: it's a fuel platform in its own right. The Starfarer is designed not only to load, store, and protect fuel stasis units, but also to collect and refine space gases for use without ever landing. And while it excels at that role, the Starfarer can also be pressed into service hauling traditional bulk cargo. The listed cargo capacity applies only to the dedicated cargo hold and does not account for the additional space provided by the bulk containers.
descriptions.misc-starfarer-gemini: The UEE military uses a rugged, hard-hitting Gemini variant of the Starfarer adapted for frontline operations, trading some cargo capacity and maneuverability for reinforced armor, increased shielding, stronger engines, and more powerful manned turrets. The Gemini also includes an optional missile pod that can be swapped in for the fuel intake unit on the nose of one of the Starfarer variants. The listed cargo capacity applies only to the dedicated cargo hold and does not account for the additional space provided by the bulk containers.
descriptions.misc-starlancer-max: Forge better, safer, and more prosperous worlds with the MISC Starlancer. Taking freelance operators and commercial enterprises deeper into the stars, the Starlancer ventures beyond the limits to supply the frontiers of Humanity.
descriptions.misc-starlancer-tac: Built for deep-space patrol, the TAC takes the robust Starlancer chassis and outfits it for serious offense and defense. Heavy weaponry, a dedicated snub hangar, medbeds, and eight military-spec jump seats mean you're ready for anything.
descriptions.misc-starlite: Built on MISC's legacy of reliability and purpose-driven design, the Starlite offers a helping hand to all pilots who need to reach further, stay longer, and make the return trip home. Singlehandedly refuel mid-air to provide a much-needed boost toward adventure.
descriptions.argo-mole: ARGO's pragmatic, no-nonsense approach to ship design is celebrated in the unmistakable silhouette of the MOLE. One look at this machine and you know it means business. Realize your full potential with the combined power of ARGO's patented trilateral mining system. The MOLE carries a total of 24 mineral pods, each holding 12 SCU. Eight pods can be used at once - once they're full, either head home or drop them for another ship to collect and keep mining. Three independently controlled, articulated mining arms deliver maximum output and nearly limitless versatility. The MOLE lives by the saying "many hands make light work."
descriptions.argo-moth: A medium salvager built to bridge the gap between light salvage and full industrial undertakings. With Argo's industrial heritage leading the design, the MOTH is the natural next step for those looking for team-driven, larger-scale operations.
descriptions.argo-mpuv: The ARGO Astronautics MPUV-1C (commonly "Argo Cargo") is a dedicated commercial transfer vessel, a ubiquitous intergalactic ship loader. Large numbers of Argo Cargos are responsible for loading and unloading goods on massive long-haul transports and miners that otherwise can't land on planets or in drydocks, such as the Hull D and the Orion. Some captains choose to own and operate their own Argo, while others pay a rental fee to private ships operating as port services to carry out the unloading process.
descriptions.argo-mpuv-transport: The ARGO Astronautics MPUV-1P (commonly "Argo Personnel") is built around a simple but incredibly important task: moving groups of people from place to place. The UEE Navy uses MPUV-1Ps extensively, and every new recruit can probably recall the harrowing moments when one of these ships carried them to their first deployment in space. In civilian hands, Argo Personnel ships are adapted for everything from standard taxi service to improvised combat dropship. The ARGO can transport up to eight people and their gear.
descriptions.argo-mpuv-1t: The MPUV Tractor features dual tractor beams for effortless cargo handling alongside the sturdy, reliable design you expect from Argo. Load and unload any size freighter with ease.
descriptions.grin-mtc: Drive into the fray with Greycat's tough and reliable MTC - perfect for carrying weapons and armor to battlefields, bunkers, outposts, expedition sites, and more.
descriptions.drak-mule: The Drake Mule is your workhorse for all kinds of loading and transport tasks, a six-wheeled beast of burden always determined to get the job done. Whether you need to haul cargo across the roughest terrain or load it onto larger ships and cargo decks, the Mule works. Plain and simple.
descriptions.cnou-mustang-alpha: Inspired by Silas Koerner, CEO of Consolidated Outland, the Mustang Alpha is a sleek, stylish spacecraft that uses ultralight alloys to push performance ratios to the limit, if sometimes precariously so. And now, with the optional Cargo Carrier, you can enjoy the advantages of the Alpha without sacrificing carrying capacity.
descriptions.cnou-mustang-beta: With its unmatched range, the Mustang Beta is designed for long-haul flights. The factory-standard Tarsus Leaper jump engine lets the Beta travel to the galaxy's most distant systems with ease, while the ship's unique Com4T living quarters make the journey feel as though you never left home.
descriptions.cnou-mustang-alpha-citizencon2018: Make the ultimate statement and show the universe that you're a paragon of style and a bulwark of freedom. With this limited-edition Vindicator Edition paint job, the unconventional designers at Consolidated Outland pulled out all the stops to create a trim package that commemorates CitizenCon 2948 and embodies the spirit of boldness that defines both Silas Koerner's original vision and the unyielding resolve of the UEE.
descriptions.cnou-mustang-delta: While the Delta may not be able to go toe-to-toe with some of the military-spec ships out there, reinforcing the Mustang's already strong hull with Consolidated Outland's own line of Cavalry Class Mass Reduction Armor gives it a reduced cross-section signature that levels the playing field.
descriptions.cnou-mustang-gamma: Consolidated Outland's design and engineering teams managed to fine-tune the Mustang and refine it into an admirable racer. The end result, the Mustang Gamma, delivers smooth acceleration and power on demand thanks to an innovative setup featuring three powerful Magma Jet engines for maximum thrust.
descriptions.cnou-mustang-omega: Consolidated Outland teamed up with tuning company Accelerated Mass Design to develop a limited-edition racer featuring an accelerated fuel intake for faster recycling of the ship's already impressive boost system. To round out the collaboration, AMD commissioned resident underground artist Sektor8 to create the dynamic paint job.
descriptions.cnou-nomad:
Take on the 'verse in Consolidated Outland's Nomad, a ship built to give solo pilots the freedom to express themselves as they explore the galaxy their own way.

With the versatility of a mid-size multipurpose hauler wrapped in a stylish, compact frame, Consolidated Outland's Nomad is the very model of self-sufficiency, the spirit of the open sky, and the perfect solution for anyone yearning to set out on a brand-new adventure.
descriptions.tmbl-nova: Tumbril's new Nova is a classic battlefield warrior reimagined for the modern era. This heavy tank brings a devastating combination of weapons to bear, clearing out threats on the ground and in the air alike.
descriptions.xian-nox: This fast and agile open-canopy racer from Aopoa is capable of flying on planetary surfaces or in space. Available in human space for the first time, the Nox has been specially reengineered for human pilots, so grab your ship and head to the racetrack today.
descriptions.xian-nox-kue: The Nox Kue takes its name from the Xi'an word for "thrust," and it delivers that and more. This limited edition of the open-canopy racer sports a stunning brushed-silver finish and was created specially to celebrate the first sale of the first Nox for human drivers.
descriptions.krig-p52-merlin: Originally designed to pair with the RSI Constellation, the P-52 Merlin is now available to all pilots! The Merlin is a dedicated fighter, built to be carried from place to place aboard a larger ship. With a centerline Gatling cannon and a Lightning Power engine, the Merlin is a fast, agile ship that packs a surprising punch! Ideal for racing, local reconnaissance, and quick combat.
descriptions.krig-p72-archimedes: If you're after something more agile, sparkle among the stars with Kruger Intergalactic's P-72 Archimedes. Whether for added security, exploring a system, or simply the joy of flying, the Archimedes is the perfect companion craft. With an extra intake and a lighter hull than its sister ship, the Archimedes offers exceptional handling and lift in a sleek package you'll want to take along for the ride.
descriptions.krig-p72-archimedes-emerald: This compact snub, precision-built and styled with urban sophistication, isn't just for show. Fast and responsive, it's the ideal companion for larger ships or the perfect partner for a solo dash through the atmosphere. The Archimedes Emerald features an exclusive Stellar Fortuna livery, available for a limited time only.
descriptions.anvl-paladin: A formidable gunship with durable armor and immense firepower. Capable of hitting multiple targets simultaneously, the missiles, side turrets, and moveable central turret provide almost complete coverage as you lead the charge against enemies of the Empire.
descriptions.rsi-perseus: When RSI set out to make the definitive modern statement in compelling deterrence, it looked to its own past, to the historic gunboats bearing the Perseus designation. Capable of tearing apart sub-capital-class Goliaths, the mere presence of a Perseus gunboat in a blockade or patrol formation is enough to make even your most aggressive foes think twice before attacking, just like its old namesake.
descriptions.drak-pitbull: A snub fighter built for close-range skirmishes and vicious scraps. All engines and guns, this snub fighter uses speed and maneuverability to get in close for the kill. Small, simple, and seriously lethal.
descriptions.rsi-polaris: The Polaris is a nimble corvette-class capital ship that packs a powerful punch with a full loadout of turrets and torpedoes. Intended for service as both a naval patrol ship and a flagship for militia operations, the Polaris is capable of carrying out search-and-rescue missions, light assaults, and general security patrols. The Polaris includes the facilities to repair, rearm, and refuel a single fighter, light bomber, or support ship.
descriptions.espr-prowler: Named after the UPE military designation, the Prowler is a modernized version of the infamous Tevarin armored personnel carrier. Esperia's astro-engineers were granted unrestricted access to study the original versions of the ship, recently discovered in the Kabal system, to aid in the vehicle's meticulous reconstruction. The Prowler is now the perfect fusion of two cultures: the elegance and effectiveness of the Tevarin war machine combined with the reliability of modern human technology.
descriptions.espr-prowler-utility: The Prowler Utility: Like the original Prowler, the Utility embraces the alien design of the infamous Tevarin ship entrusted to Esperia decades ago. However, its 32-SCU cargo hold and integrated tractor beam make this variant as practical for hauling as it is visually striking.
descriptions.grin-ptv: Got a massive hangar? The Greycat PTV allows you to get from one end to the other without needing to stop for lunch on the way.
descriptions.mrai-pulse: The Mirai Pulse redefines the hoverbike experience, combining sleek design, integrated weaponry, and advanced thrusters for unmatched maneuverability. It's the ultimate choice for anyone seeking a blend of precision, speed, and combat readiness in challenging environments.
descriptions.mrai-pulse-lx: Take your racing experience to the next level with the Pulse LX, the frontrunner among high-speed racers. The Pulse LX is built to dominate. It sheds weight and cuts drag so you finish at the front of every race. Feel every corner with crystal-clear responsiveness, making the Pulse LX a revelation on the track.
descriptions.argo-raft: As with all its divisions, Argo takes cargo transport seriously in every respect, and the RAFT is no exception. It can carry three standardized 32 SCU cargo containers for a total transport capacity of 96 SCU. The RAFT is an ideal solution for reliable local freight hauling, suited to newcomers and seasoned haulers alike. Once again, Argo gets the job done.
descriptions.gama-railen: The Railen is Gatac's first foray into the human market. It's an elegant, cross-species ship, perfectly suited to any human or Xi'an pilot looking for a safe, reliable solution for medium cargo transport. The Railen is a prime example of why the Xi'an Empire has entrusted House Gatac with the production of its industrial ships for centuries. It leverages patented grav-lev technology and a proven design, updated for the year 2951 and beyond.
descriptions.misc-razor: MISC is making a bid for the next Murray Cup with the new Razor. This advanced racer features a sophisticated composite spaceframe that prioritizes raw speed above all else.... it's the ship for pilots who want to leave the competition in the dust.
descriptions.misc-razor-ex: Fitted with signature-reducing materials, the Razor EX was a special build for the UEE Advocacy for use in surveillance and extraction operations. Although the EX was ultimately rejected for wide deployment, MISC released a variation of the model to the public for those seeking a lower profile.
descriptions.misc-razor-lx: The Razor gets supercharged. The LX features an overclocked engine to perfectly unleash blistering top speeds. This performance comes at a cost, incurred through reduced maneuverability and weaponry, making it ideal for straight-line flight. But who needs weapons when you're leaving your competition in the dust?
descriptions.aegs-reclaimer: The Aegis Reclaimer is an industrial salvage ship. Equipped with a reinforced cargo hold, a long-range quantum drive, and launch pods for unmanned drones, the Reclaimer is an ideal ship for exploiting the spoils of wrecks in space. Tractor beams, floodlights, scanner options, and docking ports round out the loadout of this powerful, utilitarian spacecraft.
descriptions.aegs-reclaimer-showdown:
The Aegis Reclaimer is an industrial salvage ship. Equipped with a reinforced cargo hold, a long-range quantum drive, and launch pods for unmanned drones, the Reclaimer is an ideal ship for exploiting wrecks in deep space. Tractor beams, floodlights, scanner options, and docking ports complete the loadout of this powerful, utilitarian spacecraft.

The listed cargo capacity refers only to the dedicated cargo hold and does not account for the capacity of salvaged material, which will be detailed further at a later time.
descriptions.aegs-redeemer: Now you can own the next big spaceship! Designed by the backers of Star Citizen, the Aegis Redeemer is a mighty combat ship that can hold its own in a fight with a powerful loadout and payload. Armed with turrets and missiles, the Redeemer also serves as an armored dropship, capable of delivering armored soldiers for first-person combat!
descriptions.aegs-retaliator: The Aegis Dynamics Retaliator has landed! One of the most powerful warbirds of the United Empire of Earth, the Retaliator was conceived as a fearsome weapons platform to strike and destroy capital ships. A key part of the UEE's power projection, Retaliator squadrons have served with distinction against outlaws, the Vanduul, and beyond. This version of the Retaliator includes the bomb bay and torpedo launchers.
descriptions.grin-roc: At Greycat, we know that mining is no simple affair, which is why we designed the ROC to be as hardworking and versatile as the miners who use it. Small enough to reach hard-to-access ore deposits, yet with enough power to tackle the tough jobs, the ROC is the perfect addition to any mining operation. It's ideally suited for large-scale use and a first-rate entry-level vehicle for aspiring miners. Whatever the task, with Greycat you have the right tool for the job.
descriptions.grin-roc-ds: At Greycat, we know there's no one-size-fits-all in mining. That's why we engineered the ROC-DS to be as hardworking and versatile as the miners who use it. With more than double the ore capacity of the standard ROC and a dedicated outrigger seat for manual laser operation, the ROC-DS makes big jobs manageable. It's the perfect addition to any mining operation, from major excavations to fledgling outfits. Whatever the task, with Greycat, mining duos now have the right tool to comfortably collect more ore.
descriptions.aegs-sabre: As part of Aegis Dynamics' Phase Two of new ship models, the Sabre was developed as a space superiority fighter for situations where you need to leave a lighter footprint. Built as a fast-strike asset, the Sabre is more than capable of establishing battlefield dominance across a wide variety of combat scenarios.
descriptions.aegs-sabre-comet: Developed as part of the "Masters of Flight" series in collaboration with the Arena Commander flight simulator, the Sabre Comet honors the famed pilot Captain Kamur Dalion for his work with Aegis to usher in a new era of combat ship construction. The Sabre comes fitted with specialized dogfighting-oriented equipment and a custom special paint job that pays tribute to this legendary ship.
descriptions.aegs-sabre-firebird: A high-speed fighter specializing in rapid barrages from its bespoke missile array. Built to destroy threats before they can react, it's equally at home heading out on long-range missions or scrambling to protect your base of operations.
descriptions.aegs-sabre-peregrine: The fastest Sabre model yet conceived, the Peregrine takes the infamous military-born chassis and tunes it for pure unadulterated speed.
descriptions.aegs-sabre-raven: As part of Aegis Dynamics' Phase Two of new ship models, the Sabre was developed as a space superiority fighter for situations where you need to leave a smaller footprint. The Raven variant raises the bar even higher, retaining the speed and maneuverability of its Sabre forebear but with a lower ship signature, making it a fast, stealthy infiltrator.
descriptions.rsi-salvation: A beginner-friendly ship that brings a career in salvaging within everyone's grasp. With a compact design and easy-to-use functionality, RSI's newest offering upholds its legacy of hope for the future.
descriptions.xnaa-santokyai: Harnessing the power of next-generation Xi'an flight systems, enhanced dual-vector thrusters, and a formidable weapons package, Aopoa has crafted a fighter that retains the agile handling and precise behavior the brand is known for. All this with the added ability to deliver a heavy blow when the situation demands it. Welcome to the future of spaceflight, courtesy of the Xi'an Empire and Aopoa.
descriptions.rsi-scorpius:
From the RSI experts in Killian and the same engineers who brought you some of the galaxy's most famous war machines comes the next evolution in heavy combat, interception, and defense systems - the RSI Scorpius.

With an adaptable dual-wing configuration and a revolutionary rail-mounted remote turret, the Scorpius delivers unprecedented weapons coverage suited to both defensive and offensive applications.
descriptions.rsi-scorpius-antares: From RSI's research and development teams in Killian and the same engineers who brought you some of the galaxy's most famous war machines comes the next evolution in heavy combat, interception, and defense - the RSI Scorpius. With its adaptable dual-wing configuration and revolutionary rail-mounted remote turret, the Scorpius delivers unmatched weapons coverage, enabling both defensive and offensive operations.
descriptions.glsn-shiv: Don't ask how we got it, don't ask where it came from, just ask, "Do you want it?"
descriptions.anvl-spartan: Built on Anvil's rugged Atlas platform - the same chassis used for the devastating Ballista anti-air system - the Spartan takes armored personnel transport to the next level. A fully armored bay with eight comfortable jump seats is the perfect way to get your squad to any battlefield. The Spartan's low profile shields it from anti-air weaponry, and a remote-controlled Gatling turret helps clear the area for an easier deployment.
descriptions.argo-srv: When it comes to getting the job done, the ARGO doesn't dawdle. From simple goods and cargo hauling to demanding search-and-rescue operations, the SRV handles whatever you throw at it. The custom-built tractor system uses an innovative plate-and-arm combination that enables effortless solo operation as well as precise team hauling for larger tasks. Your crew and passengers also stay safe thanks to durable shields and rugged armor that protect the cockpit and components when things get hairy.
descriptions.vncl-stinger: A closely replicated Vanduul ship, reworked for Human flight. As Esperia's first Heavy Fighter, the Stinger prioritizes strong armor to sustain prolonged barrages while readying its attack.
descriptions.tmbl-storm: Originally introduced in 2606 during the Second Tevarin War, the Tumbril Storm was a single-operator mini-tank that tore across battlefields and knocked out enemy artillery. The latest Storm has been reconceived from the ground up to be faster, stronger, and more impactful than ever. It's a true force of nature, perfectly suited to the frenetic landscape of modern warfare.
descriptions.tmbl-storm-aa: Blitz across crowded battlefields, take out threats from the air, and turn the tide of any conflict.
descriptions.grin-stv: With Greycat's STV, you can look forward to plenty of fun while you work. Built by pros for pros, this Sport Terrain Vehicle stands out with blistering speed and practical storage space.
descriptions.gama-syulen: The Syulen cargo ship is masterfully crafted by the renowned House Gatac and is perfectly suited to both human and Xi'an pilots. With its nimble frame, the Syulen excels at swiftly ferrying important deliveries across the universe, making it the ideal vessel for anyone making their debut in the hauling business.
descriptions.espr-talon: This ship is Esperia's recreation of the Tevarin Talon. The Talon is the Tevarin equivalent of the Aegis Gladius or Vanduul Blade: a single-seat fighter. It's the perfect example of the Tevarin approach to shipbuilding, being highly maneuverable with strong, directional "Phalanx" shields but weak physical armor, since the Tevarin way of war was to strike first and strike hard before deploying their Phalanx shields to cover their retreat.
descriptions.espr-talon-shrike: This ship is Esperia's recreation of the Tevarin Talon. The Talon is the Tevarin equivalent of the Aegis Gladius or Vanduul Blade: a single-seat fighter. It's the perfect example of the Tevarin approach to shipbuilding, being highly maneuverable with strong, directional "Phalanx" shields but weak physical armor, since the Tevarin way of war was to strike first and strike hard before deploying their Phalanx shields to cover their retreat.
descriptions.anvl-terrapin: Introducing the Anvil Aerospace U4A-3 Terrapin-class scanning and exploration ship. The Terrapin was developed toward the end of the 28th century to serve as the first ship in the Empire's defensive restructuring of the Navy. The Terrapin's motto is protection, with extensive shield systems and layers of armor designed to give pilot and crew the best possible defense. While it lacks the maneuverability of a dedicated fighter, it carries an advanced, hard-hitting array of weapons meant to keep even the most fearsome Vanduul raider at bay.
descriptions.anvl-terrapin-medic: Durable, heavily armored rescue ship that can take on any battlefield or environ.
descriptions.aegs-tiburon: A ferocious and forward-facing force capable of eliminating the deadliest prey out there. Assemble a crew of military-minded recruits to discharge every weapon, gun, and missile the Tiburon has at its command as you circle your prey.
descriptions.gama-tyilui: Walk on walls and sail through the multi-directional zero-gravity hangar in Gatac's first carrier craft. Missiles, pilot weapons, and turrets create a daunting deterrent for obstacles along the way as you deploy Snub Fighters into conflict zones, while additional cargo space supports rearming, refueling, and repair in combat.
descriptions.rsi-ursa-rover: Designed by RSI specifically for the planetary explorer, the Ursa Rover brings military-grade all-terrain capability to civilians and stands as the rugged standard for ground-based reconnaissance, mapping, and exploration.
descriptions.rsi-ursa-rover-emerald: Fortune favors the bold. The most trusted name in all-terrain exploration captures the very essence of luck and success with this limited special edition of the Ursa Rover.
descriptions.rsi-ursa-medivac: A frontline medical support vehicle built to endure the harshest environments - a beacon of hope bringing you back into action with its state-of-the-art Tier 3 medical bed. An indispensable asset for any team facing unpredictable challenges.
descriptions.grin-utv: All the reliability and resilience of Greycat in a compact two-seater. Embodying essential functionality, this no-nonsense rugged transporter gets you from A to B with 1 SCU of cargo and a weapons rack to keep you armed.
descriptions.anvl-valkyrie: In days of old, it was believed the Valkyrie chose who would live and who would die on the field of war. Now Anvil places that choice in your hands. Seize destiny and turn the tide of battle. Rugged, high-performance folding seats carry up to twenty personnel safely into and out of combat. A vehicle bay and speed ramp efficiently launch ground-based transport or reconnaissance vehicles for unmatched support. Four powerful VTOL thrusters allow surgically precise takeoffs and landings, while a devastating array of weapons blurs the line between dropship and gunship.
descriptions.vncl-scythe: Quickly becoming a symbol of the Vanduul race, the Scythe is the foot soldier of every raid and the target of every human combat pilot. While it carries a heavy weapons loadout, the Scythe's true advantage is its maneuverability, found in its two main and twelve maneuvering thrusters.
descriptions.aegs-vanguard-harbinger: The Vanguard Harbinger is Earth's standard bomber, converting the standard Vanguard Warden's escape pod into a potent bomb bay. The Vanguard's extended range and relatively small profile mean it can go where carrier-based craft or larger strategic bombers cannot... then strike hard and make it back to frontier bases. The Vanguard Harbinger is a powerful bomber capable of operating from the roughest forward bases.
descriptions.aegs-vanguard-hoplite: The Vanguard Hoplite is a blend of the victorious Vanguard deep space fighter and a dedicated boarding ship. By adapting the reliable design for amphibious operations, the Hoplite is the perfect tool for deploying an armored strike team with enough firepower to get them back out again.
descriptions.aegs-vanguard-sentinel: The Vanguard Sentinel is a ship built to fight smart rather than take enemies head-on. The conversion features an AR cockpit, an external e-war pod, decoy missiles, and a suite of EMP charges. Vanguard Sentinels often provide the combat support necessary for combined operations. A lone Sentinel assigned to wild weasel duties is frequently paired with Harbinger bombers and Warden escorts for large assault missions.
descriptions.aegs-vanguard: A hard-bitten bulldog of a fighter, fitted with an extensive array of forward-facing weapons designed to punch through the shields and armor of other ships. So named because their multi-jump range lets them form the vanguard of any military expedition, the Vanguards have seen extensive service against the Vanduul.
descriptions.drak-vulture: Answer to no one, cut out the middleman, and throw caution to the wind. Tear wrecks apart like a pro and carve out your own place in the great empty hall from behind the flight stick of this rough, rugged salvage machine from Drake Interplanetary.
descriptions.orig-x1: Welcome to the next level with the X1, Origin Jumpworks' new high-performance open-canopy vehicle. Built from lightweight polymers, the X1 takes speed and agility to the next level thanks to seamlessly integrated engine technology and the shared placement of its vectored thrust rudders. Innovative design and premium engineering combine for a flight experience like no other.
descriptions.orig-x1-force: The X1 Force is a modified version of the base X1 model, fitted with additional defensive elements to reinforce this fast and agile open-canopy bike, allowing it to serve in a wide range of roles, from exploring worlds to potential security incursions.
descriptions.orig-x1-velocity: How do you make fast go faster? Origin Jumpworks' X1 Velocity dares to push the limits of speed by stripping the base X1 down to its core, removing the weapon mount and integrating new synthetic composites to create a lighter chassis and shed overall weight.
descriptions.rsi-zeus-cl: The Zeus Mk II is ready to carry a whole new generation of travelers across the universe. It's a tribute to the classic ship that first took humanity to the stars in 2140. The Zeus Mk II CL is built for trade, featuring extra cargo space and a tractor beam for hauling large volumes of cargo.
descriptions.rsi-zeus-es: The Zeus Mk II is ready to carry a whole new generation of travelers across the universe. It's a tribute to the classic ship that first took humanity to the stars in 2140. The Zeus Mk II ES focuses on exploration, featuring a robust radar package to make new discoveries, along with upgraded weapons and shields.
